description: Awareness frame templates for user-facing explanations
notes: AG-PROMPT-SURFACE-EPISTEMIC-BOUNDARIES-018: Indicator-centric language when no documentClass. Never imply document category from signals alone.
copyPrinciples: Actionable: guidance tells them what they can do
Probabilistic: reflect what we observed, not ground truth

frames.headline: This file contains medical or health information
frames.noClassHeadline: Indicators that may relate to health information were found
frames.noClassInferredHeadline: Some patterns may relate to health information
frames.summary: Some patterns are consistent with health records or clinical data.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: A few patterns may relate to health information.
frames.notes: AG-PROMPT-SURFACE-HEADLINE-EPIS-POLICY-020: noClassHeadline prevents category overreach when documentClass is null.

frames.headline: This file contains financial or payroll data
frames.noClassHeadline: Indicators that may relate to financial information were found
frames.inferredHeadline: Patterns suggest possible payroll or compensation content
frames.noClassInferredHeadline: Some patterns may relate to financial information
frames.summary: Some patterns are consistent with salary or payment details.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: A few patterns may relate to payment information.
frames.notes: AG-PROMPT-SURFACE-HEADLINE-EPIS-POLICY-020: noClassHeadline prevents category overreach when documentClass is null.

frames.headline: This file contains employee or HR records
frames.noClassHeadline: Indicators that may relate to employment information were found

frames.noClassInferredHeadline: Some patterns may relate to employment information
frames.summary: Some patterns are consistent with employee records.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: A few patterns may relate to employee information.
frames.notes: AG-PROMPT-SURFACE-HEADLINE-EPIS-POLICY-020: noClassHeadline prevents category overreach when documentClass is null.

frames.headline: This file contains legal agreement language
frames.noClassHeadline: Indicators related to legal language were found
frames.noClassInferredHeadline: Some patterns may relate to legal terminology
frames.summary: Some patterns are consistent with contracts or agreements.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: A few patterns may relate to legal terminology.
frames.notes: AG-PROMPT-SURFACE-EPISTEMIC-BOUNDARIES-018: noClassHeadline used when selected by signals, not document classification.

frames.headline: This file contains a government-issued identifier
frames.noClassHeadline: This file may contain a government-issued identifier
frames.inferredHeadline: This file appears to contain a government-issued identifier
frames.noClassInferredHeadline: This file may contain regulated personal information
frames.summary: Some patterns may be subject to privacy or compliance rules.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: A few patterns may relate to regulated data.
frames.notes: AG-PROMPT-SURFACE-EPISTEMIC-BOUNDARIES-018: noClassHeadline avoids category implication without classification.

frames.headline: This file contains personal contact information
frames.noClassHeadline: Indicators that may relate to individuals were found
frames.inferredHeadline: Patterns suggest information that could identify a person
frames.noClassInferredHeadline: Some patterns may relate to identifiable information
frames.summary: Some patterns may relate to an identifiable individual.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: A few patterns may relate to personal details.

frames.headline: Sensitive content was found in this file
frames.noClassHeadline: Sensitive content was found in this file
frames.inferredHeadline: This file may include sensitive content
frames.noClassInferredHeadline: This file may include sensitive content
frames.summary: Some patterns may be private or confidential.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: A few patterns may relate to personal information.
frames.notes: AG-PROMPT-SURFACE-EPISTEMIC-BOUNDARIES-018: Default frame, uses noClassHeadline when no documentClass.

frames.headline: This file could not be fully analyzed
frames.summary: This file's structure limited what could be read locally. The AI tool may extract more than we could analyze.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: Some content in this file may not have been fully analyzed locally.
frames.guidance: Review the file for sensitive information before proceeding.
learnMore: Some PDFs store text as positioned graphics without text maps, which limits local extraction.
Form fields and annotations may contain additional content outside the main text layer.
Ai Notice does not send your file anywhere — your decision here is final.
frames.notes: AG-PROMPT-162 (8B): Improved extraction-limited copy. Factual, calm, user-agency-explicit.

frames.headline: This file contains insurance policy information
frames.noClassHeadline: This file may contain insurance-related information
frames.inferredHeadline: This file appears to contain insurance or policy content
frames.noClassInferredHeadline: This file may relate to insurance information
frames.summary: Some patterns are consistent with insurance policy details.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: A few patterns may relate to insurance information.
frames.guidance: Insurance documents often contain personal details. Review before sharing externally.
frames.notes: AG-PHASE-5C-056: Insurance policy frame for documents with policy numbers, coverage terms, personal details.

frames.headline: This file contains multiple types of sensitive information
frames.inferredHeadline: This file may contain multiple types of sensitive information
frames.notes: AG-PROMPT-SURFACE-PROBABILISTIC-LANGUAGE-017: Used when multiple signal families are present.

frames.headline: This file has internal sharing restrictions
frames.summary: Language commonly used to limit redistribution was found.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: Some markers may indicate distribution limits.
frames.notes: AG-PROMPT-SURFACE-PROBABILISTIC-LANGUAGE-017: Distribution sensitivity (not content sensitivity). Used when ONLY confidentiality markers are present, without regulated content signals.

frames.headline: This file may contain payroll information
frames.summary: The filename or metadata suggests this may contain salary or payment information. Text extraction was limited.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: The filename or metadata suggests this may relate to payroll. Full content could not be verified.
frames.guidance: Consider this sensitive and review before sharing. This PDF could not be fully analyzed.
frames.notes: AG-PHASE-5E-058: Shown when extraction is degraded/blocked but filename/metadata indicate payroll content.

frames.headline: This file may contain employment information
frames.summary: The filename or metadata suggests this may contain HR or employment information. Text extraction was limited.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: The filename or metadata suggests this may relate to employment. Full content could not be verified.
frames.guidance: Consider this sensitive and review before sharing. This PDF could not be fully analyzed.
frames.notes: AG-PHASE-5E-058: Shown when extraction is degraded/blocked but filename/metadata indicate HR content.

frames.headline: This file may contain insurance information
frames.summary: The filename or metadata suggests this may contain insurance policy information. Text extraction was limited.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: The filename or metadata suggests this may relate to insurance. Full content could not be verified.
frames.guidance: Consider this sensitive and review before sharing. This PDF could not be fully analyzed.
frames.notes: AG-PHASE-5E-058: Shown when extraction is degraded/blocked but filename/metadata indicate insurance content.

frames.headline: This file appears to be an invoice or receipt
frames.noClassHeadline: Indicators related to invoices were found
frames.noClassInferredHeadline: Some patterns may relate to billing or invoices
frames.summary: This document contains billing or payment information that may include personal or financial details.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: A few patterns may relate to billing or invoice information.
frames.notes: AG-PROMPT-175: Invoice frame. Prevents invoice/legal collision.

frames.headline: This file appears to be a health certificate
frames.noClassHeadline: Indicators related to health records were found
frames.inferredHeadline: Patterns suggest possible health or vaccination content
frames.noClassInferredHeadline: Some patterns may relate to health documentation
frames.summary: This document contains health-related information that may include personal identifiers.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: A few patterns may relate to health documentation.
frames.guidance: Health documents typically contain sensitive personal data. Review before sharing.
frames.notes: AG-PROMPT-175: Health certificate frame for COVID/vaccination certificates.

frames.headline: This file may contain commercially sensitive information
frames.noClassHeadline: Indicators related to business-sensitive content were found
frames.inferredHeadline: Patterns suggest possible commercially sensitive content
frames.noClassInferredHeadline: Some patterns may relate to business-sensitive information
frames.summary: Some patterns are consistent with business-sensitive or transaction-related content.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: A few patterns may relate to commercially sensitive information.
frames.guidance: Business-sensitive documents may contain material non-public information. Review before sharing externally.
frames.notes: AG-PROMPT-188: Closes the M&A/business-sensitive frame gap identified in AG-PROMPT-185.

frames.headline: We couldn’t determine what this file contains
frames.summary: No clear indicators were found, but content could not be fully assessed.
frames.lowSeveritySummary: No specific indicators were found. Review if you believe it may contain personal details.
frames.guidance: Use your judgment based on what you know about this document.
frames.notes: AG-PROMPT-SURFACE-PROBABILISTIC-LANGUAGE-017: Fallback frame for weak or no evidence. Used when signalCount = 0 or evidence is ambiguous.
